spring.description: Spring overshoot easing. Used for button press release, card appearing, streak counter increment, and all elements that should feel physically responsive. The 1.275 overshoot creates the 'bouncy' feel.

smooth.description: Standard Material smooth easing. Used for page transitions, opacity fades, expanding/collapsing sections, and any motion that should feel effortless.

decelerate.description: Deceleration curve. Used for elements entering the viewport — sliding in from off-screen, notifications appearing, bottom sheet opening.

accelerate.description: Acceleration curve. Used for elements leaving the viewport — swiping off, dismissing, closing bottom sheets.

sharp.description: Sharp easing for quick state changes. Toggle switches, checkbox checks, radio selections. Fast and decisive.

instant.description: 100ms — Near-instant feedback. Checkbox fill, toggle state change, button color on press. Below human perception threshold for 'delay'.

fast.description: 150ms — Quick transition. Hover state changes, icon swaps, ripple trigger. Default for all interactive hover feedback.

normal.description: 300ms — Standard transition. Screen enter/exit, card expand/collapse, press feedback. Default for most UI transitions.

slow.description: 500ms — Deliberate motion. Elaborate celebrations, streak counter roll animation, page cross-fade transitions.

dramatic.description: 800ms — Statement motion. Streak failure shatter effect, confetti explosion, milestone achievement reveal. Used sparingly for emotional impact.

celebration.description: 1200ms — Full celebration sequence. Complete particle animation cycle, Lottie milestone animation duration.

default.description: Default spring config for Compose/React Native Reanimated. Balanced bounce for cards, buttons, and standard interactive elements.

snappy.description: Snappy spring for quick interactions. Toggle switches, swipe-to-complete snap back, gesture release.

gentle.description: Gentle spring for hero animations. Streak counter entrance, onboarding illustration, modal appearing. More bounce, slower settle.

bouncy.description: Maximum bounce. Confetti particles, celebration effects, restart button animation. Playful and expressive.

confirm.description: Positive confirmation haptic. Habit completion, streak continued, successful action.

reject.description: Rejection haptic. Streak broken, failed validation, destructive action confirmation.

tick.description: Light tick haptic. Scrolling through picker wheels, dragging items, incrementing steppers.

heavyClick.description: Heavy impact haptic. Drag-to-reorder lift, long-press context menu open, dramatic button presses.
